name: multiple stack-add flags accumulate and dedupe into a single sorted stack list
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --stack-add aws --stack-add react --stack-add aws --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["stack"]==["aws","react"] ? 0:1)' && echo stack-dedupes 1>&2
